title: Poland and Iceland joined the agreement to launch the Special...
title_en: Poland and Iceland joined the agreement to launch the Special...
title_uk: Польща та Ісландія приєдналися до угоди про запуск Спец...
description: Poland and Iceland joined the agreement to launch the Special Tribunal for the crime of aggression against Ukraine. The required number of 17 member states of the Council of Europe has been reached for the agreement to be voted on in May, - Minister Andrii Sybiga.
description_en: Poland and Iceland joined the agreement to launch the Special Tribunal for the crime of aggression against Ukraine. The required number of 17 member states of the Council of Europe has been reached for the agreement to be voted on in May, - Minister Andrii Sybiga.
description_uk: Польща та Ісландія приєдналися до угоди для запуску Спецтрибуналу щодо злочину агресії проти України. Досягнуто необхідної кількості — 17 держав-членів Ради Європи — для винесення угоди на голосування у травні, — міністр Андрій Сибіга.

title: Missile launch detected
description: Russia may launch a new attack on Ukraine tonight, - Zelensky "Another Russian attack may follow tonight. There are many "Shahedov" in the sky over Ukraine now. Perhaps missiles will also be used"
description_en: Russia may launch a new attack on Ukraine tonight, - Zelensky "Another Russian attack may follow tonight. There are many "Shahedov" in the sky over Ukraine now. Perhaps missiles will also be used"
description_uk: россия может нанести новый удар по Украине сегодня ночью, - Зеленский "Сегодня ночью может последовать очередной российский удар. В небе над Украиной сейчас много "Шахедов". Возможно, будут задействованы и ракеты"

title: Casualties reported
description: 🤬 In Cherkasy, rioters killed an 8-year-old boy, UAVs attacked the city and the region. 9 people were also injured.
description_en: 🤬 In Cherkasy, rioters killed an 8-year-old boy, UAVs attacked the city and the region. 9 people were also injured.
description_uk: 🤬 В Черкассах рашисты убили 8-летнего мальчика, - ОВА Город и область атаковали БПЛА. Также пострадали 9 человек.

title: 25 injured
description: 💬 Andriy Sybiga commented on the Russian attack on the Dnieper: "At least 5 people were killed and 25 injured as a result of a Russian missile attack on the Dnieper. A terrible terrorist act against civilians in broad daylight. Enough pauses in the pressure on Russia! The 20th package of EU sanctions and a loan of €90 billion must be unblocked as soon as possible."
description_en: 💬 Andriy Sybiga commented on the Russian attack on the Dnieper: "At least 5 people were killed and 25 injured as a result of a Russian missile attack on the Dnieper. A terrible terrorist act against civilians in broad daylight. Enough pauses in the pressure on Russia! The 20th package of EU sanctions and a loan of €90 billion must be unblocked as soon as possible."
description_uk: 💬 Андрій Сибіга прокоментував російський удар по Дніпру: "Щонайменше 5 людей загинули і 25 отримали поранення внаслідок ракетного удару Росії по Дніпру. Жахливий терористичний акт проти цивільних серед білого дня. Досить пауз у тиску на Росію! 20-й пакет санкцій ЄС та кредит у €90 мільярдів мають бути розблоковані якнайшвидше".

title: Russia has turned the Zaporozhye NPP into an instrument of global...
title_en: Russia has turned the Zaporozhye NPP into an instrument of global...
title_uk: Росія перетворила Запорізьку АЕС на інструмент глобальної...
description: Russia has turned the Zaporozhye NPP into an instrument of global nuclear blackmail - and, according to Greenpeace senior nuclear specialist Sean Berna, this is not chaos, but a well-thought-out military strategy. In the interview, he explains how the occupiers were preparing for a possible restart of the reactors, why they are building new power lines in the occupied territories, and why each loss of external power to the station brings...
description_en: Russia has turned the Zaporozhye NPP into an instrument of global nuclear blackmail - and, according to Greenpeace senior nuclear specialist Sean Berna, this is not chaos, but a well-thought-out military strategy. In the interview, he explains how the occupiers were preparing for a possible restart of the reactors, why they are building new power lines in the occupied territories, and why each loss of external power to the station brings...
description_uk: Россия превратила Запорожскую АЭС в инструмент глобального ядерного шантажа - и, по словам старшего ядерного специалиста Greenpeace Шона Берни, это не хаос, а продуманная военная стратегия. В интервью он объясняет, как оккупанты готовили возможный перезапуск реакторов, зачем строят новые линии электропередачи на захваченных территориях и почему каждая потеря внешнего питания станции приближает...

title: Kharkiv: Russia targets critical dam in Kharkiv Oblast with glide bombs,...
title_en: Kharkiv: Russia targets critical dam in Kharkiv Oblast with glide bombs,...
title_uk: Харків: Росія націлила плануючими бомбами важливу дамбу в Харківській області,...
description: Russia targets critical dam in Kharkiv Oblast with glide bombs, governor says. Six such bombs were directed at the Pechenihy dam in Chuhuiv district, one of the largest reservoirs in the region and a key infrastructure facility, Syniehubov said on national television.
description_en: Russia targets critical dam in Kharkiv Oblast with glide bombs, governor says. Six such bombs were directed at the Pechenihy dam in Chuhuiv district, one of the largest reservoirs in the region and a key infrastructure facility, Syniehubov said on national television.
description_uk: Russia targets critical dam in Kharkiv Oblast with glide bombs, governor says. Six such bombs were directed at the Pechenihy dam in Chuhuiv district, one of the largest reservoirs in the region and a key infrastructure facility, Syniehubov said on national television.

title: Luhansk: Radar stations and air defense systems of the enemy were hit. As part...

description: Radar stations and air defense systems of the enemy were hit. As part of reducing the air defense capabilities of the Russian aggressor, units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine continue to inflict fire damage on the enemy's air defense equipment. ⚡️In particular, the "Nebo-U" radar station (the city of Feodosia, TOT AR Crimea) was affected. ⚡️Also, the defeat of the radar station of the air control system on 04/13/2026 was confirmed...
description_en: Radar stations and air defense systems of the enemy were hit. As part of reducing the air defense capabilities of the Russian aggressor, units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine continue to inflict fire damage on the enemy's air defense equipment. ⚡️In particular, the "Nebo-U" radar station (the city of Feodosia, TOT AR Crimea) was affected. ⚡️Also, the defeat of the radar station of the air control system on 04/13/2026 was confirmed...
description_uk: Уражено радіолокаційні станції та ЗРК противника У рамках зниження можливостей протиповітряної оборони російського агресора підрозділи Сил оборони України продовжують завдавати вогневого ураження по засобах ППО противника. ⚡️Зокрема уражено радіолокаційну станцію "Небо-У" (м. Феодосія, ТОТ АР Крим). ⚡️Також, підтверджено ураження 13.04.2026 радіолокаційної станції системи контролю повітряного...

title: Zaporizhzhia: Strike confirmed on residential building
title_en: Zaporizhzhia: Strike confirmed on residential building
title_uk: Запоріжжя: підтверджено удар по житловому будинку
description: At least 2 killed, 18 injured in Russian strikes across Ukraine over past day Although the Ukrainian Air Force successfully intercepted 115 aerial targets, several strikes impacted civilian infrastructure across Kherson, Kharkiv, Zaporizhzhia, Dnipropetrovsk, Odesa oblasts and the city of Chernihiv, damaging a medical facility, residential complexes, and port facilities. Photo: Local authorities
description_en: At least 2 killed, 18 injured in Russian strikes across Ukraine over past day Although the Ukrainian Air Force successfully intercepted 115 aerial targets, several strikes impacted civilian infrastructure across Kherson, Kharkiv, Zaporizhzhia, Dnipropetrovsk, Odesa oblasts and the city of Chernihiv, damaging a medical facility, residential complexes, and port facilities. Photo: Local authorities

title: Attack attack on energy grid
description: ☢️The Russian attack on the New Safe Confinement of the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant changed not only the technical condition of the facility, but also the future of Chernobyl itself. In a long interview for UNIAN, the senior nuclear specialist of Greenpeace Ukraine Sean Berny warns: the risk of the old sarcophagus collapsing over the 4th reactor has now become a "virtually inevitable scenario", and the world is still not fully aware of the scale of the threat. It's about...
description_en: ☢️The Russian attack on the New Safe Confinement of the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant changed not only the technical condition of the facility, but also the future of Chernobyl itself. In a long interview for UNIAN, the senior nuclear specialist of Greenpeace Ukraine Sean Berny warns: the risk of the old sarcophagus collapsing over the 4th reactor has now become a "virtually inevitable scenario", and the world is still not fully aware of the scale of the threat. It's about...
description_uk: ☢️Российский удар по Новому безопасному конфайнменту ЧАЭС изменил не только техническое состояние объекта, но и само будущее Чернобыля. В большом интервью для УНИАН старший ядерный специалист Greenpeace Украина Шон Берни предупреждает: риск обрушения старого саркофага над 4-м реактором теперь стал «фактически неизбежным сценарием», а мир до сих пор не до конца осознаёт масштаб угрозы. Речь идёт...

title: Donetsk: Drone incoming
description: MISCELLANEOUS AND 114 ENEMY UAVS BROKEN DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of April 14 (from 18:00 on April 13), the enemy attacked with four Kh-59/69 guided air missiles from the TOT of the Donetsk region, and 129 strike UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas type and other types of UAVs from the directions: Kursk, Orel, Bryansk, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, TOT Donetsk, Chauda - TOT AR Crimea, about 90 of them are "shahedy". Air strike...

Air strike...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО РАКЕТУ ТА 114 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА У ніч на 14 квітня (з 18:00 13 квітня) противник атакував чотирма керованими авіаційними ракетами Х-59/69 із ТОТ Донецької обл., та 129 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed, Гербера, Італмас та безпілотниками інших типів із напрямків: Курськ, Орел, Брянськ, Приморсько-Ахтарськ – рф., ТОТ Донецьк, Чауда – ТОТ АР Крим, близько 90 із них – "шахеди". Повітряний напад...

title: Zaporizhzhia: Explosions reported
description: Drones reportedly strike targets in occupied Zaporizhzhia Oblast, Crimea. A substation was struck by drones in occupied Zaporizhzhia Oblast, and explosions were heard in several cities across Crimea overnight on April 14, Telegram channel Exilenova Plus reported.
description_en: Drones reportedly strike targets in occupied Zaporizhzhia Oblast, Crimea. A substation was struck by drones in occupied Zaporizhzhia Oblast, and explosions were heard in several cities across Crimea overnight on April 14, Telegram channel Exilenova Plus reported.
description_uk: Drones reportedly strike targets in occupied Zaporizhzhia Oblast, Crimea. A substation was struck by drones in occupied Zaporizhzhia Oblast, and explosions were heard in several cities across Crimea overnight on April 14, Telegram channel Exilenova Plus reported.
